verse_text: For He received from God the Father honor and glory when such a voice came to Him from the Excellent Glory: 'This is My beloved Son, in whom I am well pleased.'

links.context: The OT prophecies concerning the glorification of Jerusalem are fulfilled in the eternal Kingdom (see Is 60). Created light is unnecessary. For the everlasting Uncreated Light will illumine all ([[PSA.35:10]]) with true and clear vision to see things as they really are. The true Light, the Light of the world ([[JOH.8:12]]), was incarnate ([[JOH.1:9]]), and even while on earth He shone with Uncreated Light ([[MRK.9:2]]-8; [[2PE.1:16]]-18). As prophesied, all the earth will stream to the Holy City to honor it (Is 55:5; [[JER.16:19]]-21; Tb 13:13; see also 1En 10:21; 48:4, 5)--it has no enemies--but only the pure will live within it ([[MAT.5:8]]).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
